schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post
Response Revoke Session Api V1 Auth Sessions  Session Id  Delete
Response Delete Channel Api V1 Channels  Channel Id  Delete
Response Set Override Api V1 Channels  Channel Id  Overrides Put

post.description:
Authorized voice-channel join (ADR-0005): requires membership and the
CONNECT_VOICE capability on this specific channel; SPEAK controls whether
the token can publish. Room name and identity are derived server-side.

schema.title: Response Delete Community Api V1 Communities  Community Id  Delete
Response Unban Member Api V1 Communities  Community Id  Bans  User Id  Delete

get.description:
Replay the durable event log after `after_seq` — the reconnect path.
Bounded to 500 events per call; clients page by advancing after_seq.

schema.title: Response Kick Member Api V1 Communities  Community Id  Members  User Id  Delete

Response Assign Role Api V1 Communities  Community Id  Members  User Id  Roles  Role Id  Put
Response Revoke Device Api V1 Devices  Device Id  Delete
Response Delete Message Api V1 Messages  Message Id  Delete

post.description:
Toggle the caller's reaction (add if absent, remove if present).
Requires SEND_MESSAGES on the channel.

schema.title: Response Toggle Reaction Api V1 Messages  Message Id  Reactions Post
Response Delete Role Api V1 Roles  Role Id  Delete
